title: Luffy Decides to Free Zoro
description: On pages 10–13, this part centers on Zoro’s endurance, Helmeppo’s cruelty, and Luffy’s decision to recruit the captured swordsman.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zolo...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Kulina!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: CHALENGE YOU TOA duel.. with real swords!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You're not afraid of real swords are you?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: REAL SWORDS? Okay...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's YOUR FUNERAL.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ON GUARD!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'M READY!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: UWAHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: YAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: THAT MAKES 2001 TIMES I'VE BEATEN YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Darn!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's so Trust- Rating!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'M THE ONE WHO'S FRUS- TRATED...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WHEN GIRLS GET OLDER, THEY BECOME WEAKER THAN THE BOYS.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: PRETTY SOON YOU'LL ALL BE STRONGER THAN ME.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zolo, you're always saying...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...that you're going to become the world's greatest swords- man...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: DAD SAYS THAT GIRLS CAN'T BE MASTER SWORDSMEN...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: YOU'RE LUCKY YOU'RE A BOY, ZOLO...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WANNA BECOME THE WORLD'S GREATEST SWORDSMAN TOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: BUT I'M STARTING TO GET BREAS...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WISH I WAS A BOY...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WHAT ARE YOU CRYING ABOUT! YOU BEAT ME!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: THAT'S NOT FAIR! BEATING YOU IS MY DREAM!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: zolo...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SOMEDAY I'LL BEAT YOU BECAUSE I WORKED HARD, NOT BECAUSE YOU GOT WEAKER!! IT'S GOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT NOT BOTHING TO

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'M TRAINING ALL THE TIME TO BEAT YOU! YOU'RE MAKING ME LOOK BAD!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: LET'S MAKE A PROMISE TO EACH OTHER!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SOMEDAY, ONE OF US WILL BECOME THE GREATEST SWORDSMAN EVER!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WE'LL FIGHT EACH OTHER FOR THE TITTLE!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You idiot!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
